results.rendered_html:
udghāṭana a. (nī f.) Opening, unlocking; dharmaṃ yo na karoti niṃditamatiḥ svargārgalodghāṭanaṃ  H. 1. 153. 
— naṃ
1 Opening;  Ve. 1. 
2 Raising, lifting up, hoisting.
3 A key, any means of opening.
4 The rope and bucket of a well; a water-wheel.
